title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 21.
content:
There was an Old Person of Hurst,
    Who drank when he was not athirst;
    When they said, "You'll grow fatter,"
    He answered, "What matter?"
    That globular Person of Hurst.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 21.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
